data.title: New Addresses Receive Significant ETH Transfer
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, three newly created addresses have received 72,898 ETH, valued at $279 million, from FalconX and BitGo. These addresses are suspected to belong to Bitmine.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 1,080 USDT with a Narrowed 6.06% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 18, 2025, 00:43 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 1,080 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,080.609985 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 6.06% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: UK to Establish Stablecoin Regulations by End of 2026
data.description: According to PANews, the United Kingdom is set to develop regulations for stablecoins by the end of 2026. Consultations on stablecoin regulation are scheduled to begin on November 10. Sources indicate that there is tension between the Bank of England and the government regarding this issue. The Bank of England aims to align its framework with the implementation of U.S. regulations.

data.title: Bank of America’s Merrill Lynch To Pay $9,500,000 in Damages After Employee Steals $2,590,000 From Customer, Splurges on Jewerly, Strip Clubs, Hotels and Shopping: Report
data.description:
Bank of America’s wealth advisory unit Merrill Lynch has agreed to pay $9. 5 million to settle a fraud suit brought by a former NFL player. Reshad Jones accused a former adviser at the unit of embezzling $2. 59 million and using the money for personal expenses, ESPN reports

data.title: Huobi founder Li Lin to join Asian group to launch $1B ETH treasury company
data.description:
Li Lin, the founder of cryptocurrency exchange Huobi and chairman of Hong Kong-based investment firm Avenir Capital, is reportedly joining some of the early backers of Ethereum to establish a $1 billion ETH-focused treasury project, marking one of Asia’s largest coordinated bets on the world’s second-largest blockchain network. Li is joining forces with several of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/huobi-founder-asian-group-eth-treasury/

data.title: Markets are increasing bets on three Fed rate cuts this year
data.description: According to CME's "Fed Watch," the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut in October is 96.3%, and the probability of a 50 basis point cut is 3.7%. The probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut in December is 0%, the probability of a 50 basis point cut is 85%, the probability of a 75 basis point cut is 14.6% (the probability was 0% yesterday), and the probability of a 100 basis point cut is 0.4%.

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald is pushing Tether to raise about $15 billion from investors
data.description: Cantor Fitzgerald, a US financial services firm, is pushing Tether Holdings to raise approximately $15 billion from investors, valuing the company at $500 billion, comparable to OpenAI. A year ago, Cantor Fitzgerald purchased a 5% stake in Tether for over $600 million in convertible bonds. If Tether meets its fundraising target, Cantor's stake could be worth $25 billion.

data.title: Visa: Stablecoins may reshape the global $40 trillion credit market
data.description: According to Visa's latest report, stablecoins have facilitated approximately $670 billion in loans over the past five years, with the average loan amount increasing from $76,000 to $121,000. USDC and USDT account for 98% of this, consistent with their $307 billion market share. Visa notes that stablecoins have the potential to transform the credit landscape by enabling traditional financial institutions to migrate portions of the $40 trillion global credit market to programmable blockchain systems. However, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) warns that the rapid development of stablecoins could lead to increased leverage, risk accumulation, and maturity mismatches in the financial system. The Visa report emphasizes that banks and financial institutions should understand how programmable money can reshape the credit market to seize potential opportunities.

data.title: CME plans to launch sports events and economic indicators contracts to compete with Kalshi
data.description: CME Group plans to launch financial contracts tied to sports and economic indicators by the end of the year. According to people familiar with the matter, this move will put the Chicago-based CME in direct competition with prediction market platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket. Kalshi and Polymarket have rapidly entered the financial mainstream in recent years and have the backing of advisors such as Donald Trump Jr., the son of President Trump.

data.title: Spot gold breaks through $4,300/ounce, setting a new record high
data.description: Spot gold continued to rise, breaking through $4,300 per ounce, setting a new record high, rising nearly $100 during the day, an increase of nearly 2.5%.

data.title: Charles Schwab plans to launch spot Bitcoin and cryptocurrency trading services in 2026
data.description: American financial giant Charles Schwab plans to launch spot Bitcoin and cryptocurrency trading services in 2026.

data.title: Trump White House dinner attracts donations from crypto executives, with Gemini, Ripple, Coinbase and others in attendance
data.description: US President Trump held a fundraising dinner at the White House on Wednesday evening to raise funds for the new White House Ballroom, which he proposed in July and is expected to cost $250 million. Attendees included Gemini co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss, as well as executives from Coinbase and Ripple. The ballroom is expected to add approximately 8,361 square meters of space to the White House. In addition to crypto companies, representatives from Meta, Google, Amazon, Lockheed Martin, and Microsoft also attended the dinner.

data.title: Bitwise: The market is in panic, it’s time to stockpile Bitcoin
data.description: Bitcoin's recent weakness appears to have dampened market enthusiasm, with Google search interest plummeting to multi-month lows. The latest market sentiment index reflects the typical bear market phase, with caution dominating the crypto market. The Crypto Fear & Greed Index has fallen to 24, the "fear" level, its lowest point in the past year and a significant drop from 71 last week. This decline is similar to the sentiment seen during Bitcoin's brief dip below $74,000 in April of this year, and echoes market weakness cycles in 2018 and 2022. Despite the sharp drop in sentiment, Bitwise analysts believe the current situation is more conducive to "buying on dips" rather than retreating. André Dragosch, Head of Research, Max Shannon, Senior Researcher, and Ayush Tripathi, Research Analyst, stated that the recent correction is primarily driven by external factors, and that historically, such extreme sentiment often signals a good entry point before a rally.

data.title: Analyst Says Bitcoin Price Is Ready To Surge: ‘We Would Already Be Below $108,000 If The Crash Wasn’t Over’
data.description:
As the week draws to a close, Bitcoin continues to show signs of resilience following its dramatic flash crash to the $101,000 price level last weekend. After days of intense volatility and heavy liquidations across the market, the world’s largest cryptocurrency has managed to stabilize above this level, even reaching as high as $113,400 during the week. In this context, crypto analyst Tyrex shared a bullish outlook on X, stating that the worst of the downturn is behind and that Bitcoin could soon be gearing up for an upward surge back to $117,000. Bitcoin’s Price Action Reinforces Bottoming Thesis Tyrex believes Bitcoin’s repeated defense of the $108,000 to $105,000 zone is a strong indication that the market has already bottomed out
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-price-ready-to-surge/

data.title: Experts Say Hype Is More Undervalued Now Than at $13, 21Shares Files 2X Hyperliquid ETF
data.description:
Key Insights: Hyperliquid (HYPE) traded near $37 on Thursday, slipping about 6% for the week as selling pressure persisted. Analysts said bearish sentiment had deepened across the derivatives market, adding weight to the token’s decline. Market data showed open interest falling and funding rates turning negative, both signs that traders were losing confidence
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/17/experts-say-hype-is-more-undervalued-now-than-at-13-21shares-files-2x-hyperliquid-etf/

data.title: G20 Watchdog Sounds Alarm: Privacy Rules Are Handcuffing Global Crypto Oversight
data.description:
The G20's Financial Stability Board reports that the conflict between global crypto oversight and privacy rules is hindering supervision, as data protection laws prevent effective cross-border monitoring.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/g20-watchdog-sounds-alarm-privacy-rules-are-handcuffing-global-crypto-oversight/
